scripts.source:zip: mkdir -p dist && rm -f dist/fireload-source.zip && zip -X -r dist/fireload-source.zip manifest.json src popup options onboarding icons amo README.md package.json tools .github -x '*.DS_Store' -x 'dist/*'
scripts.test: node tools/test-shared.mjs && node tools/test-background.mjs && node tools/test-content.mjs && node tools/test-popup.mjs && node tools/test-options.mjs
